primary_sources.name: KDIGO Clinical Practice Guideline for Acute Kidney Injury
primary_sources.relevance: Definitive guidelines for AKI definition, staging, diagnosis, and management including RRT indications

primary_sources.name: Acute Kidney Injury: Epidemiology, Outcomes, Complications, and Therapeutic Strategies
primary_sources.relevance: Comprehensive review of AKI pathophysiology, management, and transition to CKD

primary_sources.name: Acute Kidney Injury Network: Report of an Initiative to Improve Outcomes in Acute Kidney Injury
primary_sources.relevance: Updated consensus on AKI classification, biomarkers, and clinical management protocols

primary_sources.name: NKF KDOQI Clinical Practice Guidelines and Clinical Practice Recommendations for Anemia in Chronic Kidney Disease
primary_sources.relevance: Guidance on AKI-CKD transition care and long-term management considerations

secondary_sources.name: Brenner and Rector's The Kidney
secondary_sources.relevance: Comprehensive textbook covering AKI pathophysiology and differential diagnosis

gaps: Limited recent updates to KDIGO AKI guidelines since 2012
Need for more specific guidance on novel biomarkers and precision medicine approaches
